title: hariota parasitica
intro: Hariota parasitica, also known as the broomrape or leafy broomrape, is a parasitic plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hariota parasitica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Hariota parasitica can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, making it a versatile herb for herbal remedies.
